title: Hesiodia lanata

taxonomy: Hesiodia lanata is a genus of flowering plants in the family Aizoaceae. The classification of Hesiodia lanata is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the clade Angiosperms, then the clade Eudicots, then the clade Asterids, and finally the family Aizoaceae. Within the family Aizoaceae, Hesiodia lanata is classified as a member of the subfamily Ruschioideae. This subfamily is a group of succulent plants native to the southern part of Africa. Further research on the species is required for a more detailed classification.
